backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor that includes blob storage mixin and provides CRUD operations for services (add, get, update, delete) and returns static business information for Bodyshape Fitness in Dallas, TX.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of the 20 Year Anniversary background image in the homepage hero section with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and configuration files for the Bodyshape Fitness application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining OKLCH color system variables for light and dark modes with true red accent colors (hue 25-30) for the fitness brand theme.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO-optimized meta tags and title for Bodyshape Fitness personal training in Dallas, TX.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for Home and Locations pages wrapped in a Layout component.
Background music player component with play/pause, mute, and volume controls that persists user preferences to localStorage and uses a Bensound workout track.
frontend/src/components/ImageGallery.tsx: Interactive image gallery component displaying 12 Bodyshape Fitness facility photos in a responsive grid with hover effects and modal dialog for enlarged views.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper with Bodyshape Fitness branding, responsive navigation with mobile menu, BackgroundMusic integration, and footer with Independence Kentucky location details and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LocationCard.tsx: React component that displays a location card with address, phone, and hours information using icons from lucide-react and a Card UI component.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: React component that renders a grid of customer testimonials with star ratings, displaying reviews from the reviews data file in styled cards.
frontend/src/data/reviews.ts: TypeScript data file exporting a Review interface and an array of 6 customer reviews with ratings, text, reviewer names, and dates.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous actor for backend communication, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity storage, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file for React Query hooks that would interact with the backend; currently exports nothing as no backend queries are needed.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining light/dark theme colors, importing Inter and Bebas Neue fonts, and setting up a bold red fitness brand theme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component into the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page component featuring a hero section with background image, 20th anniversary badge, manager profile section with Allen D.'s photo and bio, and various fitness-related content sections.
frontend/src/pages/Locations.tsx: Locations page component displaying gym location details, contact information (phone, email, address), hours, and an embedded Google Maps iframe for Bodyshape Fitness in Independence, KY.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file that defines custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, typography settings with Inter and Bebas Neue fonts, container queries, animations for accordions, and includes typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking a fitness facility website build for Bodyshape Fitness in Independence, Kentucky, documenting architectural notes about content sourcing from Facebook/Yelp, known issues with incorrect placeholder content and styling (pink vs red colors), and existing features for homepage, gallery, locations page, and visual design.
